title: glyceria remota
intro: Glyceria remota is a species of grass commonly known as the "prairie grass" or "remote sweet grass". It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glyceria remota include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce stress. Glyceria remota can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and has also been used in some cultures as a food ingredient.
